subject: [PATCH v7 14/15] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-06-29.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd read-write-protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel's selftests/mm suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including async and sync modes, page mapping, mprotect, GUP walks, and fork operations. They verify that RWP works correctly in different memory types, such as anonymous, shared memory, and huge pages. The patch also includes test cases for edge cases like flipping between sync and async modes without re-registering the uffd and restoring page permissions when closing the uffd.
